utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Who is that ? !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Don’t worry , I’m brave ! I am brave ! I ... I am brave !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: No ... no ... no ... no ! !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Can you tell me who is there please ?

utterances.speaker: Gary
utterances.text: My name is Gary , I live upstairs .

utterances.speaker: Gary
utterances.text: Hi !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Hi . Do you know what time it is ?

emotion_cause.span: 7_Do you know what time it is ?

utterances.speaker: Gary
utterances.text: It is candy time !

utterances.speaker: Gary
utterances.text: My roommate says that they taste like little drops of heaven .

emotion_cause.span: 9_My roommate says that they taste like little drops of heaven .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh please ! Did you hear that ? Little drops of heaven .

emotion_cause.span: 9_My roommate says that they taste like little drops of heaven .

utterances.speaker: Gary
utterances.text: So , can I get some candy ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I am sorry , but some of us have to get up early and go to work !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: He does not know that I am not " some of us " .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Um , listen , I am sorry , but I will put some out first thing in the morning .

emotion_cause.span: 15_I am sorry , but I will put some out first thing in the morning .

utterances.speaker: Gary
utterances.text: Well okay , I will swing by later .

utterances.speaker: Gary
utterances.text: You live in this building ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Um ... hmm .

utterances.speaker: Gary
utterances.text: Mm ! Seems like I would have remembered you !

emotion_cause.span: 19_Seems like I would have remembered you !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Mm ! Night Gar !
